DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ERP_PROJECT]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ERP_PROJECT]
( 
	[ProjectID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CustomerID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ContractID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProjectManager] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProductID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SourceVendorID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Acquisition] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DepartmentID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[EmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BillingPeriod] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CurrencyRateforBudget] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BaseType] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Subaccount] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[StartDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[EndDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CreatedOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[LastModifiedOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[DefaultAccount] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DefaultAccountDesc] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DefaultSalesSubAccount] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DefaultExpenseSubAccount] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProjectDesc] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CreatedBy] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastModifiedBy] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InstallEndDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
